headline: BofA Lowers Avery Dennison (AVY) Target as Deutsche Bank Starts Coverage Bullish
summary: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) is included among the 15 Best Low Volatility Blue Chip Stocks to Buy Now. On April 6, Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) saw its price target reduced by BofA to $201 from $210. The firm kept a Buy rating on the stock as part of its preview of the packaging and paper […]
